loan_requestment_no.text: เลขที่สัญญา

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as memname ,substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),1,2) as age_life_text ,substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),1,30) as age_mem_text ,pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card) as id_card ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.salary_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.salary_amount) as salary_amount_thai ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.spouse_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date, 'DD') as requestment_day ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date, 'MONTH') as requestment_month ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date, 'YYYY') as requestment_year ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_tel(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, '0') as telephone
--ที่อยู่ ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_line(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,0) as address_line ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_tel(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,0) as address_tel
,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ) as loan_request_amount_thai ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount) as period_payment_amount_thai ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount ,pka_lon_intsrv.fp_intrate_table_loantype( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ) * 100 as lon_int_rate ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.last_payment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sc_lon_m_loan_request.last_payment_amount) as last_payment_amount_thai ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.start_keep_date ,'DD MONTH YYYY') as start_keep_date --วันที่เริ่มงวด ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ,'DD MONTH YYYY') as requestment_date ,sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name ,sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.type_pay_money ,sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code
,(select sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_name from sc_acc_m_ucf_bank where sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code = sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_id)as bank_name ,sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.branch_code ,(select sc_acc_m_ucf_bank_branch.bank_name from sc_acc_m_ucf_bank_branch where sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code = sc_acc_m_ucf_bank_branch.bank_id and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.branch_code = sc_acc_m_ucf_bank_branch.bank_branch_id)as branch_name
,pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no,'XXX-X-XXXXX-XXXX') as bank_acc_no ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '1') as coll_no ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '1') as coll_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate, 'DD/MM/YYYY') as book_date ,(select count(loan_requestment_no) from sc_lon_m_loan_history where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and clear_target = '1') as loan_requestment_no_debt
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_cnt_m_coop
where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = 'สท' /*WHERE*/
